app.name: Retro Rewind
app.short_description: Retro Rewind is a custom track distribution created by ZPL. It features every retro track from Super Mario Kart to Mario Kart 7, as well as some Mario Kart 8, Mario Kart Tour, Mario Kart World, and Mario Kart Arcade GP tracks.
app.long_description: Retro Rewind is a custom track distribution created by ZPL. It features every retro track from Super Mario Kart to Mario Kart 7, as well as some Mario Kart 8, Mario Kart Tour, Mario Kart World, and Mario Kart Arcade GP tracks.
